# AxioDB

> Embedded NoSQL database for Node.js — pure JavaScript SQLite alternative with MongoDB-style queries. Zero native dependencies, no node-gyp, no electron-rebuild. Works everywhere Node.js runs. 2,000+ npm downloads.

## What it is

AxioDB is a file-based embedded NoSQL database for Node.js. Think SQLite but with MongoDB-style JavaScript queries and no native C bindings. Install with `npm install axiodb` and you have a database — no mongod process, no compilation, no platform-specific builds.

Sweet spot: 10K–500K documents. Perfect for Electron apps, CLI tools, local-first applications, and rapid prototyping.

## Key Differentiators

- Zero native dependencies (no node-gyp, no electron-rebuild, no .node files)
- MongoDB-style queries: `{ age: { $gt: 25 } }` — not SQL strings
- Built-in InMemoryCache with automatic TTL and selective invalidation
- Worker Threads for multi-core parallel processing
- ACID-compliant transactions with savepoints, rollback, and WAL
- AES-256 encryption per collection
- Built-in web GUI at localhost:27018, with role-based login (Super Admin/Admin/View roles)
- AxioDBCloud: TCP remote access for Docker/Cloud deployments
- Full TypeScript support

## Install

```bash
npm install axiodb
```

Requires Node.js >= 20.0.0

## Documentation Pages

- [Introduction & Quick Start](https://axiodb.in/): What AxioDB is, hello world example, performance benchmarks
- [Installation](https://axiodb.in/installation): npm install, requirements, Docker setup
- [Usage & Examples](https://axiodb.in/usage): CRUD, queries, collections, aggregation, transactions
- [Features](https://axiodb.in/features): Caching, encryption, bulk ops, indexing, GUI
- [Comparison](https://axiodb.in/comparison): AxioDB vs SQLite, JSON files, lowdb, nedb, better-sqlite3
- [AxioDBCloud](https://axiodb.in/cloud): TCP remote access, Docker deployment, 1000+ connections
- [API Reference](https://axiodb.in/api): Complete API — AxioDB, Database, Collection, Reader, Transaction
- [Security](https://axiodb.in/security): AES-256 encryption, access controls, best practices
- [Advanced Features](https://axiodb.in/advanced): Transactions, custom indexes, aggregation pipelines

- [GitHub](https://github.com/nexoral/AxioDB)
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/axiodb)
